ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exoplanets" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exoplanet */,
  "planet_name" TEXT /* Name of the exoplanet */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host star */,
  "number_of_stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars in the system */,
  "detection_method" TEXT /* Method used to detect the exoplanet */,
  "orbital_period" REAL /* Orbital period of the exoplanet in days */,
  "orbit_semi_major_axis" REAL /* Semi-major axis of the exoplanet's orbit in AU */,
  "planet_radius" REAL /* Radius of the exoplanet in Jupiter radii */,
  "planet_mass" REAL /* Mass of the exoplanet in Jupiter masses */,
  "insolation_flux" REAL /* Insolation flux received by the exoplanet */,
  "equilibrium_temperature" REAL /* Equilibrium temperature of the exoplanet in K */,
  "habitable_zone_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the exoplanet is in the habitable zone */,
  "planet_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the exoplanet (e.g., Jovians, Terrestrials) */,
  "planet_type" TEXT /* Type of the exoplanet (e.g., Gas Giant, Super-Earth) */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the exoplanet was discovered */,
  "discovery_team" TEXT /* Team or organization that discovered the exoplanet */,
  "atmospheric_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the exoplanet's atmosphere */,
  "magnetic_field_strength" REAL /* Strength of the exoplanet's magnetic field */,
  "albedo" REAL /* Albedo (reflectivity) of the exoplanet */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the exoplanet's orbit */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the exoplanet's orbit */,
  "surface_gravity" REAL /* Surface gravity of the exoplanet */,
  "age" TEXT /* Estimated age of the exoplanet */,
  "distance_from_host_star" REAL /* Distance from the exoplanet to its host star in AU */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the exoplanet to its host star */,
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the exoplanet to the detection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanets_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanets_host_name FOREIGN KEY ("host_name") REFERENCES stars ("host_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanets_detection_method FOREIGN KEY ("detection_method") REFERENCES detections ("detection_method"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanets_detection_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_id") REFERENCES detections ("detection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host star */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host star */,
  "stellar_effective_temperature" REAL /* Effective temperature of the host star in K */,
  "stellar_radius" REAL /* Radius of the host star in solar radii */,
  "stellar_mass" REAL /* Mass of the host star in solar masses */,
  "ra_degree" REAL /* Right ascension of the host star in degrees */,
  "dec_degree" REAL /* Declination of the host star in degrees */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the host star in parsecs */,
  "stellar_luminosity" REAL /* Luminosity of the host star in solar luminosities */,
  "stellar_spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the host star */,
  "stellar_age" TEXT /* Estimated age of the host star */,
  "metallicity" REAL /* Metallicity of the host star */,
  "stellar_magnetic_field_strength" REAL /* Strength of the host star's magnetic field */,
  "stellar_rotation_period" REAL /* Rotation period of the host star in days */,
  "stellar_activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the host star */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detections" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection method */,
  "detection_method" TEXT /* Name of the detection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the detection method */,
  "first_used" TEXT /* Date when the detection method was first used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the detection method was last used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the detection method */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the detection method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of using the detection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each exoplanet
